# Solareinas Ranch (Ranch Rescue)

> A regenerative ranch sanctuary in the Sierra Nevada — rescued animals, restoration projects, family retreats, and an artisan market made by hand.

Solareinas Ranch is a living sanctuary supported by a community of "stewards." We rehabilitate animals, steward the land regeneratively, host immersive retreats, and offer botanical goods grown and made on the ranch. All gifts are processed manually; we use the language of "gifts" and "support" rather than purchases.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Sanctuary overview, residents, impact, and ways to support.
- [Sponsor an Animal](/sponsor-animal): Become a steward for a rescued animal.
- [Volunteer / Free Herd](/volunteer-signup): Apply to join the volunteer family program.
- [The Market](/market): Botanical bounty — olive oil, skincare, ranch basics.
- [Shop](/shop): Dynamic product catalog from the ranch.
- [Made Here For You](/made-here-for-you): One-of-one upcycled goods.
- [Founders Riding Retreat](/gift): 10-day adult retreat.
- [Family Camp](/family-camp): Unplugged multi-generational retreat.
- [Cowgirls for Change](/cowgirls-for-change): Advocacy retreat.
- [Travel Personality Quiz](/quiz): Find the retreat that fits you.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/auth): Steward account access.
